message:
Streamline site header: reduce animations, simplify nav chrome

Broad simplification pass on both desktop and mobile navigation
to reduce visual noise and improve rendering performance.

Desktop navbar:
- Logo: smaller icon (h-9 w-9 vs h-10 w-10), simplified gradient
  (from-green-600 to-lime-400, dropped via-green-400), removed
  the FrankenGlitch hover wrapper, replaced the animated pulsing
  "ALIVE" dot indicator with static "SYSTEM_ALIVE" text label
- Navigation links: removed the Magnetic hover wrapper from each
  link, removed the AnimatePresence-driven hover background
  animation (layoutId="nav-hover") and its hoveredItem state,
  replaced the active dot indicator (layoutId="nav-active-dot")
  with a green background tint + underline (layoutId="nav-
  underline"), reduced font size to 10px font-black with wider
  letter-spacing for a more compact feel
- Scroll handler: removed the requestAnimationFrame throttle
  (ticking flag pattern) since setScrolled is already batched by
  React, and removed the initial handleScroll() call on mount
- Toolbar: rounded-lg buttons instead of rounded-full, simplified
  GitHub CTA to text-only (removed Github icon and explicit
  <span>), tighter padding, Magnetic strength reduced 0.2→0.1
- Transition easing: removed custom cubic-bezier, using default
  duration-500
- Removed FrankenGlitch import (no longer used in this file)
- Removed hoveredItem state variable entirely

Mobile bottom nav:
- Shows 4 nav items instead of 5, plus the MORE button, to give
  each icon more breathing room on narrow screens
- Removed the vertical separator divider between nav items and
  MORE button
- Removed the motion.div active glow animation (layoutId=
  "mobile-active-glow") from active tabs for simpler rendering
- Reduced label font size from 8px to 7px

Mobile drawer:
- Title changed from "Sub_System_Menu" to "SYSTEM_MENU"
- Removed transition-colors from nav link text and close button
  for simpler rendering
- Buttons use rounded-xl instead of rounded-2xl, removed explicit
  tracking-widest from toggle buttons
- Removed setOpen(false) from toggleAnatomyMode and toggleAudio
  button handlers so the drawer stays open while toggling modes
- Removed the GitHub repository link from the drawer bottom (the
  desktop CTA remains; mobile users can access GitHub from the
  home page)
- Shell interface button uses tighter tracking (0.2em vs 0.3em)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
